headline: Super vs Siri — Personal AI Agents Compared for Real Computer Work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: A fair, source‑backed comparison for people deciding between Apple’s Siri and Super. Siri is a voice‑first assistant embedded in Apple devices. Super is positioned for users who want a personal AI agent that can actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated workflows.
